# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build commands (e.g., make all, npm run build)'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Custom deployment commands (e.g., ./deploy.sh production, ansible-playbook deploy.yml)'
        required: true
        type: string
      target_environment:
        description: 'Target environment for deployment (e.g., dev, staging, production)'
        required: false
        default: 'dev'
        type: string

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, x64, datacenter] # Adjust labels as per your self-hosted runner configuration

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up environment variables
        run: |
          echo "TARGET_ENVIRONMENT=${{ github.event.inputs.target_environment }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "BUILD_SCRIPT=${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "DEPLOY_COMMAND=${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Run Custom Build Script
        id: custom_build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Executing custom build script..."
          echo "------------------------------------"
          echo "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          echo "------------------------------------"
          eval "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
        env:
          # Pass along any necessary secrets/environment variables for the build process
          # For example, if your build needs an API key:
          # MY_BUILD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.MY_BUILD_API_KEY }}
          # NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }} # Example for private npm packages

      - name: Run Custom Deployment Command
        id: custom_deploy
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Executing custom deployment command for ${{ github.event.inputs.target_environment }}..."
          echo "------------------------------------"
          echo "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}"
          echo "------------------------------------"
          eval "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}"
        env:
          # Pass along any necessary secrets/environment variables for the deployment process
          # For example, SSH keys, cloud credentials, or environment-specific tokens
          # AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          # AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          # KUBECONFIG_DATA: ${{ secrets.KUBECONFIG }} # Example for Kubernetes deployments
          # DEPLOY_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          TARGET_ENV: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_environment }} # Re-pass target environment as an env var if needed by deploy command
